summary: Tested the post-login onboarding wizard. All 10 test scenarios passed: landing page for unauthenticated users, redirect from /onboarding without token, authenticated wizard rendering (Step 1 + Step 2), all data-testid fields present, Continue/Skip/Go-to-dashboard navigation, progress dots update, and returning user bypass. One root cause found and fixed: in-memory cache had onboarding_complete=true from previous test run, requiring backend restart + JSON file reset before tests could pass.

minor.issue: onboarding_complete is excluded from allowed fields so it cannot be reset via the API. Requires direct JSON edit + backend restart to reset for testing. Not a user-facing bug but impacts test repeatability.

issues: Sectors/Stages fields show placeholder text even when data exists (pre-populated from API) - visually shows placeholder style not value style, minor cosmetic

action_items: Consider adding a reset endpoint for onboarding_complete (e.g., DELETE /api/onboarding-complete or allow false value in POST) to improve test repeatability and to let users redo onboarding
critical_code_review_comments: fund_settings.json in-memory cache is loaded once on startup. If the JSON file is manually edited, backend must be restarted to pick up changes. This is a known limitation for file-backed storage.
onboarding_complete cannot be set to false via any API endpoint - only markOnboardingComplete (true) exists. No way for user to redo onboarding without direct file edit.
updated_files: /app/backend/fund_settings.json (onboarding_complete reset to false for test user)
seed_data_creation: Reset onboarding_complete=false in fund_settings.json for test user before tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding wizard fully functional. Token is valid until May 2026. fund_settings.json currently has onboarding_complete=true after skip test - reset it before any future onboarding tests by editing the JSON and restarting backend. All data-testid attributes verified: onboarding-page, onboarding-fund-name, onboarding-thesis, onboarding-sectors, onboarding-stages, onboarding-continue-btn, onboarding-skip-btn, onboarding-go-dashboard-btn, how-it-works-card-01/02/03.
